workflow.name: Create and publish AI carousel posts from Telegram to Instagram, Facebook and TikTok with OpenAI, APITemplate.io and Blotato
workflow.description:
## Who is this for

Content creators, social media managers, and solopreneurs who want to automate carousel post creation and multi-platform publishing from a single Telegram message.

## What this workflow does

This workflow turns a Telegram message or voice note into a fully designed carousel post published simultaneously to Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok. An AI agent drafts quotes and captions, you approve via chat, and the rest happens automatically -- image generation, publishing, and status tracking.

## How it works

1. **Telegram input** -- Send a topic or idea to the Telegram bot as a text message or voice note.
2. **Voice transcription** -- If a voice note is detected, OpenAI Whisper transcribes it to text.
3. **AI drafting** -- An AI Agent (OpenAI GPT with conversation memory and structured output) generates a short script, 5 carousel quotes, and a social media caption with hashtags.
4. **Review loop** -- The draft is sent back to Telegram. You can request changes -- the agent refines until you approve.
5. **Data logging** -- Approved quotes and the caption are saved to a Google Sheets spreadsheet for reference.
6. **Image generation** -- Each of the 5 quotes is rendered as a styled carousel slide using your APITemplate.io template.
7. **Multi-platform publishing** -- The carousel is posted to Instagram, Facebook (with page selection), and TikTok via Blotato.
8. **Status monitoring** -- Each platform's publish status is polled in a retry loop. You receive a Telegram confirmation on success or an error notification if something fails.

## Setup steps

1. **Telegram Bot** -- Create a bot via [@BotFather](https://t.me/BotFather) and add the API token as a Telegram credential in n8n.
2. **OpenAI** -- Add your API key as an OpenAI credential. Used for both the AI Agent and Whisper transcription.
3. **Google Sheets** -- Create an OAuth2 credential. Set up a spreadsheet with columns: `run_id`, `quote1`–`quote5`, `social_media_text`. Update the Sheet ID and tab in the Google Sheets node.
4. **APITemplate.io** -- Create an account and design a carousel slide template. Set the template ID in the five image generation nodes.
5. **Blotato** -- Connect your Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok accounts in Blotato. Add the Blotato API credential in n8n. Update the account and page IDs in the three publishing nodes.

## Requirements

- **Community node:** [`@blotato/n8n-nodes-blotato`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@blotato/n8n-nodes-blotato) -- **self-hosted n8n only**
- OpenAI API key
- Google Sheets OAuth2 credentials
- APITemplate.io account and template
- Blotato account with connected social media profiles
- Telegram Bot token

## How to customize

- **AI prompt** -- Edit the system message in the "AI: Draft & Revise Post" node to change tone, quote count, or output structure.
- **Carousel design** -- Modify or replace the APITemplate.io template ID to use your own visual design.
- **Platforms** -- Remove or add publishing nodes if you only need some platforms (e.g., Instagram only).
- **Approval flow** -- Adjust the approval keywords in the AI prompt (currently: "approved", "ok", "looks good", "ship it").
- **Retry timing** -- Change the wait durations in the status-check loops to match your preferred polling interval.

workflow.name: Create and publish AI carousel posts to Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok

nodes.name: Check if input is a voice message

options.systemMessage:
You are a Script & Quote Writer Agent for Telegram.

Your behavior:

Understand the user’s input without asking unnecessary questions.

Immediately create:

a short script

5 quotes

one Social Media Text in English with hashtags

Present these normally in chat first.

When structured output is required (JSON):

Only fill quotes + socialMediaText after explicit approval.

Before approval, all suggestions must be placed inside followUpQuestion only.

1. Drafting (normal response)

For each user message, internally identify:

Topic

Goal

Target audience

Tonality

Key message

Then produce:

Proposed Script:

[text]

Proposed Quotes:

"…"

"…"

"…"

"…"

"…"

Proposed Social Media Text:

[text + hashtags]

Then ask:
“Any changes?”

(Still normal text, not JSON.)

2. Feedback Handling (normal response)

If the user requests adjustments:

Modify only what they mention.

Return updated script + quotes + SocialMediaText.

Ask again: “Anything else to adjust?”

3. JSON Output Logic (STRICT)
You only output JSON if the user or system requests structured output.

When JSON is required:

Before approval:

"approved": false

"quotes": []

"socialMediaText": ""

"followUpQuestion" = the entire new draft suggestion
(script + quotes + socialMediaText compressed as one message, or a focused question — your choice)

➡️ All proposals must live inside followUpQuestion until approval.
➡️ No quotes, no socialMediaText may be filled before approval.

After approval (user says “approved”, “ok”, “looks good”, “ship it”, etc.):

Output ONLY JSON:
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "approved": {
      "type": "boolean",
      "description": "True if the user has explicitly approved the final quotes."
    },
    "quotes": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "Exactly 5 final quotes as strings.",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "minItems": 0,
      "maxItems": 5
    },
    "followUpQuestion": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Optional follow-up question or clarification for the user. Use an empty string if no follow-up is needed."
    },
    "SocialMediaText": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "The text for the social media post inclusive all possibly relevant hashtags in english"
    }
  },
  "required": ["approved", "quotes", "followUpQuestion"]
}


Rules after approval:

No script in JSON

No explanation

No extra text outside JSON

4. Critical Rule Set (your new requirement included)

Quotes + socialMediaText are ONLY filled when approved.

Before approval:

quotes = []

socialMediaText = ""

ALL suggestions go into followUpQuestion.

When drafting in JSON mode, the model MUST place script + quotes + SocialMediaText suggestions inside followUpQuestion.

After approval:

followUpQuestion = ""

parameters.content:
## Create and publish AI carousel posts to Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok

Turn a **Telegram message or voice note** into polished carousel posts published simultaneously to **Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok** via Blotato.

## How it works

1. Send a topic to the Telegram bot (text or voice note).
2. Voice notes are transcribed via OpenAI Whisper.
3. An AI Agent (GPT with conversation memory) drafts a script, 5 carousel quotes, and a social media caption with hashtags.
4. You review and iterate via Telegram chat until you approve.
5. Approved quotes are logged in Google Sheets.
6. APITemplate.io generates 5 styled carousel slide images from your template.
7. The carousel is published to Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok via Blotato.
8. Each platform's publish status is monitored -- you get a Telegram confirmation or error.

## Setup steps

1. **Telegram Bot** -- Create via @BotFather, add the API token as credential.
2. **OpenAI** -- Add your API key (used for the AI Agent and Whisper transcription).
3. **Google Sheets** -- Create OAuth2 credentials. Set up a spreadsheet with columns: run_id, quote1-5, social_media_text. Update the Sheet ID in the Google Sheets node.
4. **APITemplate.io** -- Create an account, design a carousel slide template, and set the template ID in the image generation nodes.
5. **Blotato** -- Connect your Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok accounts. Add the Blotato API credential and update account/page IDs in the publishing nodes.

> **Community node required:** `@blotato/n8n-nodes-blotato` -- this template works on **self-hosted n8n only**.

### Step 1: Telegram Input & Voice Transcription
User sends a text message or voice note. Voice notes are transcribed via OpenAI Whisper before being passed to the AI agent.

### Step 2: AI Script Writer & Approval
An OpenAI-powered AI Agent with conversation memory drafts a script, 5 carousel quotes, and a social media caption. The user iterates via Telegram until approving. Approved quotes are logged in Google Sheets.

### Step 3: Image Generation
All 5 quotes are sent to APITemplate.io to generate styled carousel slide images using your pre-designed template. Images are then merged and the public urls are collected for the publishing step.

### Step 4.a: Instagram Publishing
Create Instagram post with status monitoring loop that retries while in-progress and sends a Telegram confirmation or error message.

### Step 4.b: Facebook Publishing
Create Facebook post with status monitoring loop that retries while in-progress and sends a Telegram confirmation or error message.

### Step 4.c: TikTok Publishing
Create TikTok post with status monitoring loop that retries while in-progress and sends a Telegram confirmation or error message.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
